creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170385
add x11-themes/qt4-style-Kvantum

Add a new port for the Qt4 style Kvantum.

Kvantum is an SVG-based theme engine for Qt4/Qt5, KDE and LXQT, with an emphasis on elegance, usability and practicality.

Kvantum has a default dark theme, which is inspired by the default theme of
Enlightenment. Creation of realistic themes like that for KDE was my first reason to make Kvantum but it goes far beyond its default theme: you could make themes with very different looks and feels for it, whether they be photorealistic or cartoonish, 3D or flat, embellished or minimalistic, or something in between, and Kvantum will let you control almost every aspect of Qt widgets.

QA: portlint -AC says "looks fine." Passes testport on 9.3 and 10.3 on amd64 and i386.
